message:
fix(packs/storage/minio): accept single-dash flags in mc command prefix

The MinIO pack used `(?:--\S+\s+)*` which required TWO dashes for the
flag-prefix repetition. That left single-dash mc flags unmatched, so
`mc -q rb myminio/bucket` and `mc -j rm myminio/bucket/file` slipped
past the destructive rb/rm patterns.

Changed to `(?:--?\S+\s+)*` (one or two dashes) across all 15 safe and
destructive patterns. Regression test confirms both `-q` and `-j` are
now blocked when combined with destructive subcommands.
